---
title: "Microplastics Bioindicators: Bight 23 Regional Monitoring"
author: "Leah Thornton Hampton"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document: 
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    number_sections: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r, Packages}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)

```

```{r, Data Import}

mp_sed_con <- read.csv(file = "Data/sed_mp_con.csv")

condition_scores <- read.csv(file = "Data/b23_conditionscores.csv")

```

```{r, Benthic Indices}

mpdata_scores <- left_join(mp_sed_con, condition_scores)

corr <- mpdata_scores %>%
  filter(index != "offshore_bri") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score, y = n_spec_correct))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top") +
  facet_wrap(~index, scales = "free")

corr

```
